title: Restore original Mexican food images from version 9 to selected elements

requirements.summary: Replace the first menu item card image with the authentic Mexican taco image from version 9
acceptanceCriteria: The first menu item card displays a Mexican food image, not a Chinese food image
The image matches what was shown in the live version 9 of the website
The image renders correctly and is not broken

file_operations.description: Update the first menu item card (article 1) to use the correct Mexican taco image asset frontend/public/assets/generated/tacos.dim_800x600.png from version 9, replacing any incorrect Chinese food imagery
